confidence_rationale: Clear view of all object transfers and placements. Timestamps visible throughout video. All 6 objects successfully transferred in both directions with no visible drops or missed placements.
technique_summary: Competent intermediate performance with successful completion of all transfers. Consistent technique throughout both directions, though reverse transfer phase took longer than optimal.
strengths: No objects dropped outside field of view
Successful completion of both transfer directions
All 6 objects properly placed on pegs
improvement_suggestions: Reduce time in reverse transfer phase - 50 seconds vs expert benchmark of 15-20 seconds
Practice simultaneous object manipulation to reduce overall completion time
Work on efficiency in reverse direction which showed most time loss
